store.description: Performance logging for the persistence layer (`nohrs-store`).

DiagnosticsStore.description:
Performance logging for the SQLite / redb store. All off by default, so a
default config adds no overhead. Output goes through `tracing` (targets
`nohrs_store::sql` / `nohrs_store::redb`) and is filterable with `RUST_LOG`.

log_redb_ops.description: Log redb `get`/`put`/`delete`/`batch` operations and their durations.

slow_query_ms.description:
Log SQL queries slower than this many milliseconds at `warn`. Zero (the
default) disables slow-query logging.

SortOrder.description: The column a directory listing is ordered by.

accent.description:
Accent colour, given as a named colour or a hex string. Full
customization lands in P5; P1 stores the value and applies the mode.

mode.description: Light/dark selection, or following the OS.

oneOf.description: Follow the operating system's light/dark preference.

default_sort.description: Column the listing is sorted by on load.

icon_pack.description: Identifier of the icon pack used to render entries.

show_hidden.description: Whether dotfiles are shown in listings.

description:
The fully merged, validated configuration.

Models the P1 surface (`theme` / `ui`) plus the P2 `[diagnostics]` section.
`[keybindings]` and `[plugins]` are recognised as reserved sections (see
[`is_reserved_section`]) but intentionally not deserialized yet, so their
future shapes can be added without breaking older files.

schema_version.description: On-disk schema version. Must be [`CURRENT_SCHEMA_VERSION`] for this build.

title: Config
